name: Smothered Chicken Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into stew-size chunks.
2. Wash and cut the mushrooms in half.
3. Sauté the chicken until lightly browned.
4. Add all ingredients to the chicken, including the mushroom halves.
5. Simmer for about 1 hour, or cook in a crockpot for an extended period until dinner time.
